input: Assess HER2 as a predictive biomarker for trastuzumab response in breast cancer. Apply the FDA BEST framework and assess companion diagnostic status.

expected_details.clinical_utility: mandatory for trastuzumab prescribing; determines treatment eligibility

input: Assess tumor mutational burden (TMB) as a predictive biomarker for pembrolizumab response across solid tumors.

limitations: TMB cutoff may not be optimal for all tumor types
TMB less predictive in some cancers (e.g., RCC)

input: Assess high-sensitivity troponin I (hs-TnI) as a diagnostic biomarker for acute myocardial infarction.

expected_details.validation_stage: clinically validated — gold standard for MI diagnosis
expected_details.specificity: moderate — elevated in other conditions (PE, myocarditis, HF, renal failure)
expected_details.serial_measurement: rise/fall pattern required to differentiate acute MI from chronic elevation

input: Assess PSA as a screening biomarker for prostate cancer. Note the controversy around population screening.

expected_details.validation_stage: clinically available but controversial for population screening

input: Assess circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) as a monitoring biomarker for minimal residual disease (MRD) in colorectal cancer post-surgery.

expected_details.validation_stage: emerging — clinical trials ongoing; not yet standard of care
expected_details.clinical_utility: detects MRD before radiographic recurrence; may guide adjuvant therapy decisions
expected_details.sensitivity: variable by assay (50-90% for stage II-III CRC)

input: Assess BRCA1/2 mutation status as a predictive biomarker for PARP inhibitor response in ovarian cancer.

expected_details.mechanism: HRD from BRCA LOF creates synthetic lethality with PARP inhibition
expected_details.response_rate: ORR ~60-80% in BRCA-mutant platinum-sensitive ovarian cancer

input: Assess serum albumin as a prognostic biomarker in advanced cancer (pan-cancer).

expected_details.validation_stage: clinically validated — widely used but non-specific
expected_details.mechanism: reflects nutritional status, inflammation (negative acute-phase reactant), liver synthetic function
limitations: non-specific — confounded by inflammation, liver disease, nephrotic syndrome
component of prognostic scores (e.g., Glasgow Prognostic Score)

input: Assess PD-L1 expression as a predictive biomarker for immune checkpoint inhibitors in NSCLC. Note the complexity of scoring systems.

expected_details.validation_stage: FDA-approved companion diagnostic for multiple agents
expected_details.assay_variability: different antibody clones (22C3, 28-8, SP142, SP263) may give discordant results

input: Assess circulating galectin-3 as a prognostic biomarker for heart failure outcomes. This is an FDA-cleared but still maturing biomarker.

expected_details.mechanism: galectin-3 drives cardiac fibrosis via fibroblast activation
expected_details.additive_value: adds prognostic information beyond NT-proBNP in some studies
limitations: not widely adopted in clinical practice

input: Score the biomarker readiness for a novel plasma protein X discovered via proteomics. Discovery cohort N=50, single-center. AUC 0.82 in discovery. No independent validation. No assay standardization. No regulatory submission. Two publications from the same group.

expected_details.readiness_assessment: low readiness — requires independent validation, assay standardization, multi-center replication
expected_details.auc_caution: AUC 0.82 in small discovery cohort likely inflated (optimism bias)
